message.content:
@startuml
title **Get Authority**

participant "MBO" as MBO #d5f5e3
participant "TrainController" as TC #d5f5e3

box "MBO Receives Position and Transmits Authority"
end box

group MBO Receives Position and Transmits Authority
  MBO -> MBO : receiveTrainPosition(String)
  MBO -> TC : getPosition(String)
  TC -> MBO : trainPosition[2]
  MBO -> MBO : calculateAuthority(String)
  MBO -> MBO : transmitMboAuthority(String, double[2])
  MBO -> TC : setMboAuthority(String, double)
end

@enduml
